topic: There is a fax machine in my basement I never installed, printing notes in my own handwriting.
title: A Fax Machine I Never Installed Is Writing In My Handwriting | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a fax machine in my basement I never installed.
scenes.image_prompt: an old beige fax machine on a dusty basement shelf, single bare bulb above, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I bought this house last spring, fully furnished and cheap.
scenes.image_prompt: a dim unfinished basement with stored boxes and cobwebs, low light, fog, film grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is not plugged into any line.
scenes.image_prompt: a fax machine with a loose disconnected cord hanging beside it, dusty floor, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One night it whirred to life and printed a page.
scenes.image_prompt: a fax machine feeding out a curling page under a dim bulb, dark basement, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The note was in my own handwriting.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand holding a fax page covered in shaky handwriting, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It described what I had eaten for dinner that night.
scenes.image_prompt: a handwritten fax note on a wooden basement table, faint bulb glow, fog, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The pages kept coming, every night, each one mine.
scenes.image_prompt: a pile of curled fax pages collecting on a dusty basement floor, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They started describing things before I did them.
scenes.image_prompt: a fax page held up to a bare bulb, handwriting visible through the paper, dark basement, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One predicted I would fall on the basement stairs. I did.
scenes.image_prompt: a steep dim basement staircase seen from the bottom, single light at the top, fog, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night the page described my own funeral, with a date.
scenes.image_prompt: a single fax page lying alone on a cold basement floor under a bulb, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I unplugged nothing. There was nothing to unplug.
scenes.image_prompt: a fax machine with no visible cables in a shadowed basement corner, dim bulb, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The date it gave me is tomorrow.
scenes.image_prompt: a calendar page on a basement wall with one date circled, faint bulb light, fog, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
